headline: Empowering your workforce to thrive
subheadline: Strategic HR consulting to help modern businesses attract, retain, and develop top talent. Build a culture where your team does their best work.
aboutContent:
I partner with growing businesses to build scalable HR foundations and foster cultures where people love to work. With over 15 years of experience spanning startups to Fortune 500 companies, I bring a pragmatic, human-centric approach to human resources.

My philosophy is simple: when your team thrives, your business thrives. I help leaders navigate complex organizational challenges, from talent acquisition to performance management and compliance.
